headline: India-China reset? Relaxed rules allow Beijing to invest in India after about six years of friction
summary: The Indian cabinet has approved changes to its foreign direct investment policy, allowing investments from "Land Bordering Countries."

raw.headline: India-China reset? Relaxed rules allow Beijing to invest in India after about six years of friction
raw.summary: The Indian cabinet has approved changes to its foreign direct investment policy, allowing investments from "Land Bordering Countries."

headline: Powering AI: Europe switches on its first microgrid-connected data center
summary: AVK and Pure Data Centers’ microgrid facility in Ireland could mark the region’s first step toward a privately powered ecosystem.

raw.headline: Powering AI: Europe switches on its first microgrid-connected data center
raw.summary: AVK and Pure Data Centers’ microgrid facility in Ireland could mark the region’s first step toward a privately powered ecosystem.
